name: Footer Section
description: A comprehensive website footer with multi-column link groups, social media icons, newsletter signup, contact info, and copyright. Responsive design that stacks on mobile.
whenToUse: Use as the bottom section of any website to provide navigation links, contact information, and legal notices.

props.name: columns
props.description: Array of link group columns with title and links

props.name: logo
props.description: Logo element to display in the footer

props.name: socialLinks
props.description: Array of social media links with platform and URL

props.name: showNewsletter
props.description: Whether to show a newsletter signup form

props.name: copyright
props.description: Copyright text to display at the bottom
